creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
langsmith provides a Python client for the LangSmith LLM Tracing and Evaluation
Platform, enabling developers to log, debug, and evaluate language model
applications. It integrates seamlessly with LangChain and supports creating
datasets from existing runs, making it ideal for enhancing AI model performance.
Suitable for teams aiming to streamline their LLM workflows, it simplifies the
process of tracing and evaluating intelligent agents.

WWW: https://github.com/langchain-ai/langsmith-sdk

I will attach poudriere testport logs for 14.1-R and 13.4-R soon.

Thanks in advance.
